concept: adult cute female VTuber, front-facing upper-body, Cubism v2_standard friendly

selected_candidate.notes: Cleaner adult cute design with fewer accessories and clearer face, mouth, hair, neck, shoulder, and torso boundaries.

candidates.notes: Good character appeal but too many accessories and clothing details for the first production G1 split.
Best current G0 candidate for v2_standard first production path.

g1_risks: front_bang_C will need underpaint because it overlaps the forehead
side hair tips overlap shoulders/cardigan and need draw-order review
chest ribbon and buttons should be kept simple in v2_standard material planning
